title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
